title: Building with ADK & A2A: How multi-agent collaboration designs a game
summary: Google Cloud Tech demonstrates multi-agent collaboration using the Agent Development Kit and Agent2Agent protocol to design game assets and architecture. The demo showcases distinct AI agents working together with human-in-the-loop oversight on Cloud Run.
writeup: This Google Cloud Tech video demonstrates multi-agent collaboration using the Agent Development Kit (ADK) and the Agent2Agent (A2A) protocol to design game assets and architecture. The demo shows distinct AI agents coordinating on a shared task, with human-in-the-loop oversight, deployed on Cloud Run. It illustrates how agent orchestration and inter-agent communication apply to a concrete design workflow rather than a single-agent setup.
